recommendations: Amend DASH-07 before implement: remove frontend/src/features/dashboard/CrisisSupportCard.vue from target_files, add depends_on CRISIS-01-crisis-support-reusable, and narrow AC-1 to bTIfU CustomElement mount importing @/components/crisis.
When MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS decomposes, import CrisisSupportCard from frontend/src/components/crisis/index.ts at bTIfa sidebar CE host — do not duplicate markup.
Add a PATHS consumer item (or extend PATHS-07) with depends_on CRISIS-01 to mount bTIwu on paths enrollment per layout_notes deferral in PATHS-02.
Register CrisisSupportCard in the Bubble CustomElement map for hosts bTIfU, bTIwu, bTIfa, bTIfw during implement.
